description: Check a clinical report for HIPAA / ICH-GCP / FDA regulatory markers (consent, IRB approval, study IDs, safety reporting) (read-only).
rules: read-only — never edits the input report
groups checks by regulation: hipaa (consent statement, de-identification), gcp (IRB approval, protocol, informed consent), fda (study ID, safety reporting)
each check is a boolean presence test over the file content
usage: Set REPORT_FILE (a clinical/trial report .md). Output: compliance.json.
limitation: Presence-of-keyword heuristic only; confirms that compliance language exists, not that the study is compliant. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
